understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', avoiding hazards like spikes and using movement and clicks strategically to navigate the level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was only horizontal (left or right), and after each move, gravity would make the player fall in the current gravity direction until landing or hitting a hazard. 'CLICK' was used to remove breakable blocks that blocked progress. Hazards like spikes caused immediate failure if landed on. 'UNDO' allowed reverting the last action to recover from mistakes.
